
### predict: repeat last 

  

::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/bpred/texfig/local-1bit-predict-repeat-last.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/bpred/texfig/local-1bit-predict-repeat-last.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/bpred/texfig/local-1bit-predict-repeat-last.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/bpred/texfig/local-1bit-predict-repeat-last.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}

![](/bpred/texfig/local-1bit-predict-repeat-last.figure-5.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=5}

:::




### example 

 

::: {.r-stack}
![](/bpred/texfig/1bitPredExample.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/bpred/texfig/1bitPredExample.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/bpred/texfig/1bitPredExample.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/bpred/texfig/1bitPredExample.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}

![](/bpred/texfig/1bitPredExample.figure-5.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=5}

![](/bpred/texfig/1bitPredExample.figure-6.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=6}

![](/bpred/texfig/1bitPredExample.figure-7.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=7}

![](/bpred/texfig/1bitPredExample.figure-8.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=8}

![](/bpred/texfig/1bitPredExample.figure-9.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=9}

![](/bpred/texfig/1bitPredExample.figure-10.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=10}


:::
